TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan kasienawan nu Pa-la-lin-pi-ke undukay 2026 == sabaw sepat a ciy a kasienawan nu Pa-la-lin-pi-ke undukay, itida i tuseptunem mihcaan lu bulad enem demiad katukuh tuseptunem mihcaan lu bulad caylim demiad itida i Yi-ta-li-mi-lan atu Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo mikawaw, u Yi-ta-li sakakina tulu tu a sikawaw tina Pa-la-lin-pi-ke undukay, sakakina tusa itida i kasienawan a sikawaw tina Pa-la-lin-pi-ke undukay. . mikawaw tina kawawan ÁĪĆŤĺ¶ tusepcaysiw mihcaan nem bulad lusip demiad, saka caylusip a kay nu Kuo-ci-aw-lin-pi-ke'-wi-yun-huy pikaygian itida i Kanatal Aw-huy cung-pu kitidaan itida i Zuy-se-luo-sang a sikawaw, ipikaygian ina Yi-ta-li Mi-lan-Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo maala i tuseptunem mihcaan nu kasienawan Aw-li-pi-ke' undukay atu kasienawan nu Pa-la-lin-pi-ke undukay a tukayan. saan tu tusepsepcay mihcaan nem bulad caysiw demiad kanatal Aw-li-pi-ke' wiyenhuy atu kanatal Aw-li-pi-ke' wiyenhuy masasulit tu sakakiyakuan, maala ku sapisakawaw a tukayan, saan tu tawya nu mihcaan a sikawaw tina Pa-undukayan. 2019ŚĻī6śúą24śó•,Á¨¨134 . milabuay nu masadantayay a dayhiw ŚŹÉŤ≥ĹšĽ£Ť°®Śúė pulung han makaala tu limlim nu masadantayay a miyundukayay makaala tu sapilabu nu lahecian. . ayda a nikasetsetan, namaka E'-luo-se yun-du-kayan a tademaw, namaka tuseptutu mihcaan nu nikalepacawan nu E'-W sayaway itini i kanatal milabu uu udip tu a kanatal ku sapangangan a milab utu undukayan. E'-luo-se miungdukayay a tademaw namukan tu pakanamuhay tu balucu' nu sapayuan atu E'-W a nikalepacawan caay pilihida a milabu, itini i tusepcaynem mihcaan tu lalu sayaway nu heni u udip nu kanatal ku sapngangan nu heni a milab utu Pa-un-huy, namaka tusepcaywal nu mihcaan sayaway nu hini u kanatal nu udip ku sapangangan milabu tu tabakiay nu kanatalan tu sakasetset. . siki ŚĄÄŚľŹ kalingatuan nu siki itida i tuseptunem mihcaan lu bulad nem demiad itida i Wi-luo-na makimulmulay a sakasetsetan sikawaw, u "Filmmaster Group" ku misangaaay. Pihedekan nu sikian itida i tuseptunem mihcaan lu bulad caylim demiad itida i Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo a Aw-li-pi-ke' sakayudip pilaylayan kitidaan a sikawaw, u G2 Eventi-Casta Diva ku misangaay. ,ÁĒĪFilmmaster Group‚ÄčŤ£ĹšĹú. ,ÁĒĪG2 Eventi - Casta DivaťõÜŚúėŤ£ĹšĹú. sakalecad nu wenday ÁõłťóúŚēŹť°Ć atu E'-luo-se, Pay-e'-luo-se atu W-ke'-lan sakalecad a cinglaw tusepcaynem mihcaan, mapawadwad ku kawaw i tawya i Suo-ci-tun-aw-huy, itawya nu tun-aw-huy pacukel ku kanatal tu sakanamuh nu balucu'an tu pakalaluwayluway sa nu kawawan, ina E'-luo-se-p-lin-pi-ke wiyunhuy setupen kanatal nu Pa-wi-huy ku ngangan. 2016ŚĻī, . Yi-se'-lei atu Amilika mi'dis tu Yi-lang tu bulad tuwal demiad, pikalingatuaan enem a demiadan, ina Yi-se-lei atu Amilik itida i Yi-lan nikasasakamuan mapulung a midebung, saan pacici tu Yi-lang a malaliyun tu cen-cin, u culil pasu mipacuk tu sakakaay nu Yi-lang ci A-li.H-mi-ni atu katuuday nu sakakaay a tademawan. saan ku Amilika nu pasingbungay a tademaw ci Pu-lay-n. Man-n sakamusa, aydaay nu nipiedisan mibelihay tu Aw-lin-pi-ke nu aydaay a nikalepacawan sa. 2śúą28śó•, . Kuo-ci-pa-wuy-huy patisu henay ayda tina kawawan tu nikasasetsetan a kalawlawan, micidek tu nikatahekalan tu sapidiputaw nu kawawan, sa masasungaay tu duma a kanatalan nu dayhiwan atu sakalecad nu kawaw a mahida tu ku nikalinlakuan. ina Cung-tung kitidaan nu nikalepacawan pu'tan sisa, namaka Tung-nan atu Aw-cuo a milabuay tu sakasetset atu tahudan a nikataynian kaca masasulalid. .
S.PHON: == tu s…ôp tu n…ôm mińß ¶aan kasi…ônawan nu pa-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô undukaj **** == sabaw s…ôpat a ¶ij a kasi…ônawan nu pa-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô undukaj, itida i tus…ôptun…ôm mińß ¶aan r~…ĺu bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm d…ômiad katukuńß tus…ôptun…ôm mińß ¶aan r~…ĺu bur~…ĺad ¶ajr~…ĺim d…ômiad itida i ji-ta-r~…ĺi-mi-r~…ĺan atu k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo mikawaw, u ji-ta-r~…ĺi sakakina tur~…ĺu tu a sikawaw tina pa-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô undukaj, sakakina tusa itida i kasi…ônawan a sikawaw tina pa-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô undukaj. . mikawaw tina kawawan ** tus…ôp ¶ajsiw mińß ¶aan n…ôm bur~…ĺad r~…ĺusip d…ômiad, saka ¶ajr~…ĺusip a kaj nu kuo- ¶i-aw-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô Ē~ °-wi-jun-ńßuj pikajgian itida i kanatar~…ĺ aw-ńßuj ¶uŇč-pu kitidaan itida i zuj-s…ô-r~…ĺuo-saŇč a sikawaw, ipikajgian ina ji-ta-r~…ĺi mi-r~…ĺan-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo maar~…ĺa i tus…ôptun…ôm mińß ¶aan nu kasi…ônawan aw-r~…ĺi-pi-k…ô Ē~ ° undukaj atu kasi…ônawan nu pa-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô undukaj a tukajan. saan tu tus…ôps…ôp ¶aj mińß ¶aan n…ôm bur~…ĺad ¶ajsiw d…ômiad kanatar~…ĺ aw-r~…ĺi-pi-k…ô Ē~ ° wij…ônńßuj atu kanatar~…ĺ aw-r~…ĺi-pi-k…ô Ē~ ° wij…ônńßuj masasur~…ĺit tu sakakijakuan, maar~…ĺa ku sapisakawaw a tukajan, saan tu tawja nu mińß ¶aan a sikawaw tina pa-undukajan. **********,**** . mir~…ĺabuaj nu masadantajaj a dajńßiw ***** pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺimr~…ĺim nu masadantajaj a mijundukajaj makaar~…ĺa tu sapir~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian. . ajda a nikas…ôts…ôtan, namaka …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô jun-du-kajan a tad…ômaw, namaka tus…ôptutu mińß ¶aan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu …ô Ē~ °-w sajawaj itini i kanatar~…ĺ mir~…ĺabu uu udip tu a kanatar~…ĺ ku sapaŇčaŇčan a mir~…ĺab utu undukajan. …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô miuŇčdukajaj a tad…ômaw namukan tu pakanamuńßaj tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu sapajuan atu …ô Ē~ °-w a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßida a mir~…ĺabu, itini i tus…ôp ¶ajn…ôm mińß ¶aan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺu sajawaj nu ńß…ôni u udip nu kanatar~…ĺ ku sapŇčaŇčan nu ńß…ôni a mir~…ĺab utu pa-un-ńßuj, namaka tus…ôp ¶ajwar~…ĺ nu mińß ¶aan sajawaj nu ńßini u kanatar~…ĺ nu udip ku sapaŇčaŇčan mir~…ĺabu tu tabakiaj nu kanatar~…ĺan tu sakas…ôts…ôt. . siki ** kar~…ĺiŇčatuan nu siki itida i tus…ôptun…ôm mińß ¶aan r~…ĺu bur~…ĺad n…ôm d…ômiad itida i wi-r~…ĺuo-na makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a sakas…ôts…ôtan sikawaw, u "fir~…ĺmmast…ôr group" ku misaŇčaaaj. pińß…ôd…ôkan nu sikian itida i tus…ôptun…ôm mińß ¶aan r~…ĺu bur~…ĺad ¶ajr~…ĺim d…ômiad itida i k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo a aw-r~…ĺi-pi-k…ô Ē~ ° sakajudip pir~…ĺajr~…ĺajan kitidaan a sikawaw, u g* …ô*…ônti- ¶asta di*a ku misaŇčaaj. ,*fir~…ĺmmast…ôr group***. ,*g* …ô*…ônti - ¶asta di*a****. sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu w…ôndaj **** atu …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô, paj-…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô atu w-k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺan sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a ¶iŇčr~…ĺaw tus…ôp ¶ajn…ôm mińß ¶aan, mapawadwad ku kawaw i tawja i suo- ¶i-tun-aw-ńßuj, itawja nu tun-aw-ńßuj pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ ku kanatar~…ĺ tu sakanamuńß nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an tu pakar~…ĺar~…ĺuwajr~…ĺuwaj sa nu kawawan, ina …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-p-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô wijunńßuj s…ôtup…ôn kanatar~…ĺ nu pa-wi-ńßuj ku ŇčaŇčan. *****, . ji-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ôi atu amir~…ĺika mi Ē~ °dis tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč tu bur~…ĺad tuwar~…ĺ d…ômiad, pikar~…ĺiŇčatuaan …ôn…ôm a d…ômiadan, ina ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôi atu amir~…ĺik itida i ji-r~…ĺan nikasasakamuan mapur~…ĺuŇč a mid…ôbuŇč, saan pa ¶i ¶i tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč a mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu ¶…ôn- ¶in, u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ pasu mipa ¶uk tu sakakaaj nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč ¶i a-r~…ĺi.ńß-mi-ni atu katuudaj nu sakakaaj a tad…ômawan. saan ku amir~…ĺika nu pasiŇčbuŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i pu-r~…ĺaj-n. man-n sakamusa, ajdaaj nu nipi…ôdisan mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj tu aw-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô nu ajdaaj a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan sa. *****, . kuo- ¶i-pa-wuj-ńßuj patisu ńß…ônaj ajda tina kawawan tu nikasas…ôts…ôtan a kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, mi ¶id…ôk tu nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu sapidiputaw nu kawawan, sa masasuŇčaaj tu duma a kanatar~…ĺan nu dajńßiwan atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kawaw a mańßida tu ku nikar~…ĺinr~…ĺakuan. ina ¶uŇč-tuŇč kitidaan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan pu Ē~ °tan sisa, namaka tuŇč-nan atu aw- ¶uo a mir~…ĺabuaj tu sakas…ôts…ôt atu tańßudan a nikatajnian ka ¶a masasur~…ĺar~…ĺid. .
S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan kasienawan nu Pa-la-lin-pi-ke undukay 2026 == sabaw sepat a ciy a kasienawan nu Pa-la-lin-pi-ke undukay, itida i tuseptunem mihcaan lu bulad enem demiad katukuh tuseptunem mihcaan lu bulad caylim demiad itida i Yi-ta-li-mi-lan atu Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo mikawaw, u Yi-ta-li sakakina tulu tu a sikawaw tina Pa-la-lin-pi-ke undukay, sakakina tusa itida i kasienawan a sikawaw tina Pa-la-lin-pi-ke undukay. . mikawaw tina kawawan ÁĪĆŤĺ¶ tusepcaysiw mihcaan nem bulad lusip demiad, saka caylusip a kay nu Kuo-ci-aw-lin-pi-ke'-wi-yun-huy pikaygian itida i Kanatal Aw-huy cung-pu kitidaan itida i Zuy-se-luo-sang a sikawaw, ipikaygian ina Yi-ta-li Mi-lan-Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo maala i tuseptunem mihcaan nu kasienawan Aw-li-pi-ke' undukay atu kasienawan nu Pa-la-lin-pi-ke undukay a tukayan. saan tu tusepsepcay mihcaan nem bulad caysiw demiad kanatal Aw-li-pi-ke' wiyenhuy atu kanatal Aw-li-pi-ke' wiyenhuy masasulit tu sakakiyakuan, maala ku sapisakawaw a tukayan, saan tu tawya nu mihcaan a sikawaw tina Pa-undukayan. 2019ŚĻī6śúą24śó•,Á¨¨134 . milabuay nu masadantayay a dayhiw ŚŹÉŤ≥ĹšĽ£Ť°®Śúė pulung han makaala tu limlim nu masadantayay a miyundukayay makaala tu sapilabu nu lahecian. . ayda a nikasetsetan, namaka E'-luo-se yun-du-kayan a tademaw, namaka tuseptutu mihcaan nu nikalepacawan nu E'-W sayaway itini i kanatal milabu uu udip tu a kanatal ku sapangangan a milab utu undukayan. E'-luo-se miungdukayay a tademaw namukan tu pakanamuhay tu balucu' nu sapayuan atu E'-W a nikalepacawan caay pilihida a milabu, itini i tusepcaynem mihcaan tu lalu sayaway nu heni u udip nu kanatal ku sapngangan nu heni a milab utu Pa-un-huy, namaka tusepcaywal nu mihcaan sayaway nu hini u kanatal nu udip ku sapangangan milabu tu tabakiay nu kanatalan tu sakasetset. . siki ŚĄÄŚľŹ kalingatuan nu siki itida i tuseptunem mihcaan lu bulad nem demiad itida i Wi-luo-na makimulmulay a sakasetsetan sikawaw, u "Filmmaster Group" ku misangaaay. Pihedekan nu sikian itida i tuseptunem mihcaan lu bulad caylim demiad itida i Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo a Aw-li-pi-ke' sakayudip pilaylayan kitidaan a sikawaw, u G2 Eventi-Casta Diva ku misangaay. ,ÁĒĪFilmmaster Group‚ÄčŤ£ĹšĹú. ,ÁĒĪG2 Eventi - Casta DivaťõÜŚúėŤ£ĹšĹú. sakalecad nu wenday ÁõłťóúŚēŹť°Ć atu E'-luo-se, Pay-e'-luo-se atu W-ke'-lan sakalecad a cinglaw tusepcaynem mihcaan, mapawadwad ku kawaw i tawya i Suo-ci-tun-aw-huy, itawya nu tun-aw-huy pacukel ku kanatal tu sakanamuh nu balucu'an tu pakalaluwayluway sa nu kawawan, ina E'-luo-se-p-lin-pi-ke wiyunhuy setupen kanatal nu Pa-wi-huy ku ngangan. 2016ŚĻī, . Yi-se'-lei atu Amilika mi'dis tu Yi-lang tu bulad tuwal demiad, pikalingatuaan enem a demiadan, ina Yi-se-lei atu Amilik itida i Yi-lan nikasasakamuan mapulung a midebung, saan pacici tu Yi-lang a malaliyun tu cen-cin, u culil pasu mipacuk tu sakakaay nu Yi-lang ci A-li.H-mi-ni atu katuuday nu sakakaay a tademawan. saan ku Amilika nu pasingbungay a tademaw ci Pu-lay-n. Man-n sakamusa, aydaay nu nipiedisan mibelihay tu Aw-lin-pi-ke nu aydaay a nikalepacawan sa. 2śúą28śó•, . Kuo-ci-pa-wuy-huy patisu henay ayda tina kawawan tu nikasasetsetan a kalawlawan, micidek tu nikatahekalan tu sapidiputaw nu kawawan, sa masasungaay tu duma a kanatalan nu dayhiwan atu sakalecad nu kawaw a mahida tu ku nikalinlakuan. ina Cung-tung kitidaan nu nikalepacawan pu'tan sisa, namaka Tung-nan atu Aw-cuo a milabuay tu sakasetset atu tahudan a nikataynian kaca masasulalid. .

bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm d…ômiad katukuńß tus…ôptun…ôm mińß ¶aan r~…ĺu bur~…ĺad ¶ajr~…ĺim d…ômiad itida i ji-ta-r~…ĺi-mi-r~…ĺan atu k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo mikawaw, u ji-ta-r~…ĺi sakakina tur~…ĺu tu a sikawaw suo- ¶i-tun-aw-ńßuj, itawja nu tun-aw-ńßuj pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ ku kanatar~…ĺ tu sakanamuńß nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an tu pakar~…ĺar~…ĺuwajr~…ĺuwaj sa nu kawawan, ina …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-p-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô wijunńßuj s…ôtup…ôn kanatar~…ĺ nu pa-wi-ńßuj ku ŇčaŇčan. *****, . ji-s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ôi atu amir~…ĺika mi Ē~ °dis tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč tu bur~…ĺad tuwar~…ĺ d…ômiad, pikar~…ĺiŇčatuaan …ôn…ôm a d…ômiadan, ina ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôi atu amir~…ĺik itida i ji-r~…ĺan nikasasakamuan mapur~…ĺuŇč a mid…ôbuŇč, saan pa ¶i ¶i tu ji-r~…ĺaŇč a mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu ¶…ôn- ¶in, u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ pasu mipa ¶uk tu sakakaaj nu ji-r~…ĺaŇč ¶i a-r~…ĺi.ńß-mi-ni atu katuudaj nu sakakaaj a tad…ômawan. saan ku amir~…ĺika nu pasiŇčbuŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i pu-r~…ĺaj-n. man-n sakamusa, ajdaaj nu nipi…ôdisan mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj tu aw-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô nu ajdaaj a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan sa. *****, . kuo- ¶i-pa-wuj-ńßuj patisu ńß…ônaj ajda tina kawawan tu nikasas…ôts…ôtan a kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, mi ¶id…ôk tu nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu sapidiputaw nu kawawan, sa masasuŇčaaj tu duma a kanatar~…ĺan nu dajńßiwan atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kawaw a mańßida tu ku nikar~…ĺinr~…ĺakuan. ina ¶uŇč-tuŇč kitidaan nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan pu Ē~ °tan sisa, namaka tuŇč-nan atu aw- ¶uo a mir~…ĺabuaj tu sakas…ôts…ôt atu tańßudan a nikatajnian ka ¶a masasur~…ĺar~…ĺid. .
